description: BusyMac makes native macOS and iOS productivity apps including BusyCal and BusyContacts. The apps manage calendars, tasks, and contacts locally on the user’s device while syncing directly with third-party services the user connects.
summary: BusyMac exposes local BusyCal integration surfaces only: an AppleScript automation API, a BusyCal URL handler, and a local Claude Desktop MCP extension; no public web API, GraphQL API, or standalone CLI was found on busymac.com.
